---
title: "02. Overview plots"
params: 
  se_dir: "data/se.rds"
  out_plots_dir: "plots"
  out_data_dir: "data"
  filtered_data_dir: "filtered"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    toc: yes
    toc_float: yes
    smooth_scroll: yes
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes
---

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(edgeR)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggrepel)
  library(patchwork)
  library(data.table)
  library(viridis)
  library(PCAtools)
  library(DESeq2)
  library(haven)
})

# Color-blind friendly palettes
cbbPalette <- c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9", "#009E73", "#F0E442", 
                "#0072B2", "#D55E00", "#CC79A7")
filtDir <- params$filtered_data_dir
outPlotDir <- params$out_plots_dir
outDir <- params$out_data_dir
```

## Overview Plots

### Import SE

```{r, import se}
if(!dir.exists("plots")) dir.create("plots")
seDir <- params$se_dir
se <- readRDS(seDir)
```

### Comparison Batch2 & Batch3

```{r}
se <- readRDS(seDir)
seRepSub <- se[, (se$actual_cell_name %in% paste0("E", 24:31))]
seRepSub <- seRepSub[grepl("miRNA", rownames(seRepSub)) | grepl("miR", rownames(seRepSub))]
cd <- as.data.frame(colData(seRepSub))
mapDt <- data.table(cell=colnames(seRepSub),
                    cell_name=seRepSub$actual_cell_name,
                    batch=seRepSub$batch,
                    to_be_removed=seRepSub$to_be_removed,
                    n_clean_reads=cd$Clean_Reads,
                    n_miRNA=colSums(assays(seRepSub)$counts),
                    n_unique_miRNA=colSums(assays(seRepSub)$counts>0), 
                    n_match_genome=cd$Match_Genome,
                    isActivated=cd$isActivated)
mapDt[,mapping_rate:=n_match_genome/n_clean_reads]
mapDt[,miRNA_mapping_rate:=n_miRNA/n_clean_reads]
mapDt[,batch:=factor(batch)]

p1 <- ggplot(mapDt, aes(x=cell_name, fill=batch, color=batch, y=n_miRNA))+
      geom_col(position = position_dodge(1))+
      labs(x="Samples", y="Number of reads mapping to miRNAs")+
      scale_fill_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
      scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
      theme_bw()
p2 <- ggplot(mapDt, aes(x=cell_name, fill=batch, color=batch, y=miRNA_mapping_rate))+
      geom_col(position = position_dodge(1))+
      labs(x="Samples", y="Rate of matching reads mapping to miRNAs")+
      scale_fill_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
      scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
      theme_bw()
p3 <- ggplot(mapDt, aes(x=cell_name, fill=batch, color=batch, y=n_unique_miRNA))+
      geom_col(position = position_dodge(1))+
      labs(x="Samples", y="Number of unique miRNAs detected")+
      scale_fill_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
      scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
      theme_bw()

p1 + p2 + p3 + plot_layout(guides = "collect")
ggsave(file.path(outPlotDir, "01.1_comparison_miRNA_bar.png"), width=35, height=10, units="cm")

p1 <- ggplot(mapDt, aes(x=cell_name, fill=batch, color=batch, y=n_clean_reads))+
      geom_col(position = position_dodge(1))+
      labs(x="Samples", y="Number of clean reads")+
      scale_fill_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
      scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
      theme_bw()
p2 <- ggplot(mapDt, aes(x=cell_name, fill=batch, color=batch, y=mapping_rate))+
      geom_col(position = position_dodge(1))+
      labs(x="Samples", y="Rate of reads mapping to the genome")+
      scale_fill_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
      scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
      theme_bw()
p1 + p2 + plot_layout(guides = "collect")
ggsave(file.path(outPlotDir, "01.1_comparison_overall_bar.png"), width=25, height=10, units="cm")

mapCompDt <- dcast(mapDt, cell_name~batch, value.var="n_miRNA")
p1 <- ggplot(mapCompDt, aes(x=`2`, y=`3`))+
      geom_point()+
      geom_text_repel(aes(label=cell_name))+
      geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype="dashed")+
      xlim(c(0,3000))+
      ylim(c(0,3000))+
      labs(x="Batch 2", y="Batch 3", title="Number of reads mapping to miRNAs")+
      theme_bw()
mapCompDt <- dcast(mapDt, cell_name~batch, value.var="miRNA_mapping_rate")
p2 <- ggplot(mapCompDt, aes(x=`2`, y=`3`))+
      geom_point()+
      geom_text_repel(aes(label=cell_name))+
      geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype="dashed")+
      xlim(c(0.005,0.011))+
      ylim(c(0.005,0.011))+
      labs(x="Batch 2", y="Batch 3", title="Rate of matching reads mapping to miRNAs")+
      theme_bw()
mapCompDt <- dcast(mapDt, cell_name~batch, value.var="n_unique_miRNA")
p3 <- ggplot(mapCompDt, aes(x=`2`, y=`3`))+
      geom_point()+
      geom_text_repel(aes(label=cell_name))+
      geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype="dashed")+
      xlim(c(100,420))+
      ylim(c(100,420))+
      labs(x="Batch 2", y="Batch 3", title="Number of unique miRNAs detected")+
      theme_bw()
p1 + p2 + p3 + plot_layout(guides = "collect")
ggsave(file.path(outPlotDir, "01.1_comparison_miRNA_scatter.png"), width=35, height=10, units="cm")
```

### Quality Control

#### Read Filtering Stats

```{r, to be done}
filtStats <- list.files(filtDir, 
                        pattern="filtering_stats_*", 
                        recursive=TRUE)
filtStats <- lapply(filtStats, fread)
```

#### Mapping rates

Per-sample:
```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=12}
seSub <- se[grepl("miRNA", rownames(se)) | grepl("miR", rownames(se))]
cd <- as.data.frame(colData(se))
mapDt <- data.table(cell=colnames(se),
                    cell_name=se$actual_cell_name,
                    batch=se$batch,
                    to_be_removed=se$to_be_removed,
                    n_clean_reads=cd$Clean_Reads,
                    n_miRNA=colSums(assays(seSub)$counts),
                    n_match_genome=cd$Match_Genome,
                    isActivated=cd$isActivated)
mapDt[,mapping_rate:=n_match_genome/n_clean_reads]

setorder(mapDt, -mapping_rate)
ggplot(mapDt, aes(x=cell_name, y=mapping_rate, fill=isActivated)) + geom_col() + 
  labs(x="Samples", y="Mapping rate")+
  facet_grid(cols=vars(batch), scales="free_x")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
  scale_x_discrete(guide=guide_axis(n.dodge=2))+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0.4, linetype="dashed")+
  theme_bw()
ggsave(file.path(outPlotDir, "01.1_mapping_rate.png"), 
       width=30, height=12, units="cm")

setorder(mapDt, -n_match_genome)
mapDt$cell_name <- factor(mapDt$cell_name, 
                          levels=c(setdiff(unique(mapDt$cell_name), 
                                           "N. Control"),
                                   "N. Control"), ordered=TRUE)
p1 <- ggplot(mapDt, aes(x=cell_name, y=n_match_genome, fill=isActivated)) + geom_col() + 
  labs(x="Samples", y="Number of reads matching to genome")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
  facet_grid(cols=vars(batch), scales="free_x")+
  scale_x_discrete(guide=guide_axis(n.dodge=2))+
  theme_bw()

# Finally, between 10–50% of total reads matched annotated miRNA loci
mapDt[,miRNA_mapping_rate:=n_miRNA/n_clean_reads]
p2 <- ggplot(mapDt, aes(x=cell_name, y=miRNA_mapping_rate, fill=isActivated)) + geom_col() + 
  labs(x="Samples", y="Rate of matching reads mapping to miRNAs")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
  facet_grid(cols=vars(batch), scales="free_x")+
  scale_x_discrete(guide=guide_axis(n.dodge=2))+
  theme_bw()

p3 <- ggplot(mapDt, aes(x=cell_name, y=n_miRNA, fill=isActivated)) + geom_col() + 
  labs(x="Samples", y="Number of reads mapping to miRNAs")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
  facet_grid(cols=vars(batch), scales="free_x")+
  scale_x_discrete(guide=guide_axis(n.dodge=2))+
  theme_bw()

library(patchwork)
p1 / p2 / p3 + plot_layout(guides = "collect")
ggsave(file.path(outPlotDir, "01.1_miRNA_mapping.png"), width=30, height=26, units="cm")
```

### MA-Plots

```{r}
se <- se[grepl("miRNA", rownames(se)) | grepl("miR", rownames(se))]

# remove non-covered samples
se <- se[,!(se$to_be_removed) & 
          !(se$actual_cell_name %in% c("E6", "E23"))]

rownames(se) <- unlist(tstrsplit(rownames(se), "/", keep=2))
assays(se)$counts <- floor(assays(se)$counts)

dds <- edgeR::calcNormFactors(DGEList(assay(se), 
                                      group=as.factor(se$isActivated)),
                              method="TMMwsp")
assays(se)$logcpm <- log1p(cpm(dds))
saveRDS(se, file.path(outDir, "02_sports_se.rds"))

limma::plotMA(assays(se)$logcpm,array = which(se$actual_cell_name=="E9"))
limma::plotMA(assays(se)$logcpm,array = which(se$actual_cell_name=="E3"))

limma::plotMA(assays(se)$logcpm,array =  which(se$actual_cell_name=="E18"))
limma::plotMA(assays(se)$logcpm,array = which(se$actual_cell_name=="E19"))
limma::plotMA(assays(se)$logcpm,array = which(se$actual_cell_name=="E11"))
```

### Activation groups

#### MDS plots {.tabset}

```{r}
ddsSub <- dds[rowSums(dds$counts>0)>30,]

mdsDims <- plotMDS(ddsSub, labels=se$isActivated, top=50)[c("x", "y")]
mdsDt <- as.data.table(mdsDims)
colnames(mdsDt) <- c("MDS1", "MDS2")
mdsDt <- cbind(mdsDt, as.data.table(colData(se)))
mdsDt <- cbind(mdsDt, colSums(assays(se)$counts))
setnames(mdsDt, "V2", "lib_size")
mdsDt$isActivated <- factor(mdsDt$isActivated)

cor(mdsDt$Clean_Reads, mdsDt$lib_size)
```

##### Batch 
```{r}
# double check ordering: names(mdsDims$y)==colData(se)$Vp
ggplot(mdsDt, aes(x=MDS1, y=MDS2, color=as.factor(batch)))+
geom_point(size=2)+
geom_text_repel(aes(label=actual_cell_name))+
scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
guides(color=guide_legend(title="Batch"))+
theme_bw()
```


##### Group 
```{r}
# double check ordering: names(mdsDims$y)==colData(se)$Vp
ggplot(mdsDt, aes(x=MDS1, y=MDS2, color=isActivated))+
geom_point(size=2)+
scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
guides(color=guide_legend(title="Activation"))+
theme_bw()
```

#### PCA {.tabset}

Check further components of PCA plot
```{r}
# remove low count rows
lcpmSub <- assays(se)$logcpm 
lcpmSub <- lcpmSub[rowSums(lcpmSub>0)>30,]
pcaCpm <- pca(lcpmSub, metadata=colData(se))
pcaCompCpm <- cbind(pcaCpm$rotated[,paste0("PC", 1:10)], colData(se))
pcaCompCpm$isActivated <- as.factor(pcaCompCpm$isActivated)
```

##### Group

```{r}
ggplot(pcaCompCpm, aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=isActivated))+
geom_point(size=2)+
guides(color=guide_legend(title="Activation"))+
scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
theme_bw()  
  
ggplot(pcaCompCpm, aes(x=PC3, y=PC4, color=isActivated))+
geom_point(size=2)+
guides(color=guide_legend(title="Activation"))+
scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
theme_bw()  
```

##### Batch

```{r}
ggplot(pcaCompCpm, aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=as.factor(batch)))+
geom_point(size=2)+
geom_text_repel(aes(label=actual_cell_name))+
guides(color=guide_legend(title="Batch"))+
scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
theme_bw()  
  
ggplot(pcaCompCpm, aes(x=PC3, y=PC4, color=as.factor(batch)))+
geom_point(size=2)+
geom_text_repel(aes(label=actual_cell_name))+
guides(color=guide_legend(title="Batch"))+
scale_color_manual(values=cbbPalette)+
theme_bw()  
```

## Session info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
